rulings.Case Title: ALPESHBHAI PATEL ET AL VS. ALICE TSE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons For Defendant Alice Tse
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 26, 2017, line 6. Motion To Quash Service Of Summons For Defendant Alice Tse GRANTED. Plaintiff failed to establish by competent evidence that 1177 California Street 1111 is defendant's residence, usual place of business or usual mailing address. See Olson Declaration, paragraph 15. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MOAB INVESTMENT GROUP LLC VS. DAN WISKIND ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn To Recall And Quash The Writ Of Possession Of Real Property Executed On 12-2-2016 As To Isabel Wiskind/Or The Alt To Recall Said Writ And Set Aside And Vacate Clerks'S Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 26, 2017, line 4. DEFENDANT ISABEL WISKIND Motion To Recall And Quash The Writ Of Possession Of Real Property Executed On 12-2-2016 As To Isabel Wiskind/Or The Alt To Recall Said Writ And Set Aside And Vacate Clerks'S Judgment GRANTED. Isabel Wiskind is a named Defendant per the First Amended Complaint. (FAC 1:26-2:2). Plaintiff does not refute Ms. Wiskind declaration that the FAC has not been received by her (re: FedEx delivery). Additionally, there is no default as to Ms. Wiskind on file. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MOAB INVESTMENT GROUP LLC VS. DAN WISKIND ET AL
